titles.title: I Claim the Blood Jesus Shed on Calvary (3)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a source of strength when I am weak, That takes me through When life is pressing me, I have a source of power from above, I'm covered over by a shield of love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I claim the blood Jesus shed on Calvary, Those precious blood stains Are made there just for me, For all my sin, my sickness and my pain, When I need healing, I just claim those precious blood stains

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I do not know how others make it through, Who never go to Calvary as I do, For there's a healing, Cleansing stream that flows, With peace that only His redeemed can know.
